demos.title: Tool Use Flow — How a Coding Assistant Reads a File

key_frames.caption: Language model cannot read files directly
Coding assistant appends tool instructions to request
Assistant reads file and sends contents back
Model provides final answer with file contents

walkthrough_steps: Instructor explains language models alone cannot read files — they only process and return text
Shows what happens when you ask a plain LM to read main.go — it says it can't
Explains the coding assistant automatically appends tool instructions to your request
Model responds with carefully formatted 'ReadFile: main.go'
Coding assistant intercepts this, actually reads the file, sends contents back to model
Model writes final answer based on real file contents
This system is called 'tool use' — gives models extra capabilities
